content_body: Absolutely beautiful cabin-exceeded my expectations! Lots of room for family members to have time alone as well as family togetherness. Spectacular view! Note: not an easy access to river for children who want to tube and it is 2 miles off the paved road. The kitchen was well supplied with pots, pans, and serving utensils. The grill was great! The cabin was clean, well-maintained and the pictures really did not do it justice. I would highly recommend this cabin and the area of Blue Ridge, GA to friends and family.
title: Exceeded My Expectations!
